_note: The Pizza Prince — The King of Slices! | Lancaster, PA
_upsell_targets: Add Prince Knots to any order (+$5.99)
Add extra cheese to any pizza (+$1.75)

weekly_special.name: The Weekly Decree
weekly_special.description: Ask about this week's special — the Prince always has something good cooking.
weekly_special.note: Update this each week. Current: Large Shredder + Prince Knots + Large Fries for $26.99

pizza._note: Two sizes: Medium 12 inch and Large 16 inch. Build your own or pick a specialty.

specialty.name: The Shredder
specialty.description: Our hottest pizza. Pepperoni, Italian sausage, jalapeños, banana peppers, hot sauce drizzle, and extra cheese. Not for the weak.

specialty.name: The Foot Clan
specialty.description: The everything pizza. Pepperoni, sausage, ham, ground beef, bacon, mushrooms, green peppers, onions, extra cheese. An army of toppings.

specialty.name: The Splinter
specialty.description: Old school and wise. Thinly sliced cheesesteak, grilled onions, and provolone on a white garlic base. A Lancaster classic.

specialty.name: The Leo
specialty.description: Disciplined and clean. Ricotta, fresh mozzarella, roasted garlic, olive oil, oregano, and Parmesan. White pizza done right.

specialty.name: The Mikey
specialty.description: The fun one. Ham, pineapple, extra mozzarella, and a drizzle of honey. Don't @ us — it's delicious.

specialty.name: The Raph
specialty.description: Hot-headed and bold. Grilled chicken tossed in buffalo sauce, ranch drizzle, red onions, and mozzarella.

specialty.name: The Donatello
specialty.description: The smart choice. Mushrooms, spinach, broccoli, roasted red peppers, black olives, fresh tomatoes, and fresh mozzarella. Full veggie.

specialty.name: The Casey Jones
specialty.description: A wild card. Seasoned taco beef, sour cream base, cheddar, jalapeños, diced tomatoes, and crushed tortilla chips. Yes, really.

specialty.name: The April O'Neil
specialty.description: S1E1 canon. Banana slices, Italian sausage, mozzarella, and a honey drizzle. She tried it in Turtle Tracks — the very first episode. Don't knock it till you try it.

specialty.name: The Turtle Tracks
specialty.description: Named after the episode that started it all. Grilled chicken, smoky BBQ sauce, red onions, cheddar and mozzarella blend. Our crowd-pleaser for people who aren't ready for bananas on their pizza.

cheesesteaks._note: All steaks on fresh-baked rolls. Sm = 8 inch, Lg = 12 inch.

items.name: Classic Cheesesteak
items.description: Chipped steak, grilled onions, American cheese, and marinara sauce.

items.name: Cheesesteak Hoagie
items.description: Chipped steak, grilled onions, provolone, lettuce, tomato, and mayo. Cold side, hot steak.

items.name: Chicken Cheesesteak
items.description: Grilled chicken, grilled onions, American cheese, and marinara sauce.

items.name: Buff Chicken Steak
items.description: Grilled chicken, grilled onions, American cheese, blue cheese drizzle, and medium wing sauce.

items.name: Whiz Steak
items.description: Chipped steak, grilled onions, and Cheez Whiz. The Philly purist's order.

items.name: Pizza Steak
items.description: Chipped steak, pizza sauce, grilled onions, and melted mozzarella.

items.name: The Royal Steak
items.description: Our signature. Chipped steak, grilled onions, mushrooms, green peppers, provolone, and our house garlic aioli. The Prince's best.

subs._note: All subs on fresh-baked rolls, oven toasted. Sm = 8 inch, Lg = 12 inch.

cold.name: Italian
cold.description: Genoa salami, capicola ham, provolone, oil and vinegar, lettuce, tomato, onions.

cold.name: American
cold.description: Cooked ham, cooked salami, American cheese, oil, lettuce, tomato, onions.

cold.name: Turkey
cold.description: Sliced turkey breast, American cheese, mayo, lettuce, tomato, onions.

cold.name: Ham & Cheese
cold.description: Ham, American cheese, mayo, lettuce, tomato, onions.

cold.name: Buffalo Chicken
cold.description: Crispy chicken tenders, medium wing sauce, blue cheese, provolone, lettuce, tomato.

cold.name: Tuna Salad
cold.description: House tuna salad, American cheese, mayo, lettuce, tomato, onions.

hot.name: Meatball Parm
hot.description: House meatballs, marinara sauce, melted provolone.

hot.name: Chicken Parm
hot.description: Fried chicken cutlet, marinara sauce, melted provolone.

hot.name: Sausage & Peppers
hot.description: Grilled Italian sausage, sautéed green peppers, onions, marinara, provolone.

items.name: Cheese Fries
items.description: Regular fries with cheddar or mozzarella.

items.name: Curly Cheese Fries
items.description: Curly fries with cheddar cheese sauce.

items.name: Prince's Loaded Fries
items.description: Curly fries, cheddar cheese sauce, crispy bacon, ranch drizzle. The full royal treatment.

items.name: Prince Knots
items.description: Six house-made garlic knots with marinara dipping sauce. The move for every order.

items.name: Chicken Tenders
items.description: Five crispy tenders. Plain, buffalo, BBQ, or honey mustard.

items.name: Wings
items.description: Buffalo wings in mild, hot, BBQ, garlic parm, or honey mustard. Served with blue cheese or ranch.

delivery.radius_note: We deliver within Lancaster city and surrounding areas. Call to confirm if you're unsure.
